steps.name: Topic enrichment port and adapter
steps.description: Driven port for per-topic detail fetching. Adapter downloads topic PDFs from DSIP API and extracts description, submission instructions, component instructions, Q&A text using pypdf.
criteria: Enrichment port accepts topic IDs and returns per-topic detail data
Each enriched topic includes description, submission_instructions, component_instructions, and qa fields when available
Individual topic enrichment failures logged without stopping batch
Completeness metrics reported: description/instruction/Q&A counts vs total
Progress callback invoked per topic during enrichment
Rate limiting: configurable delay between per-topic requests

steps.name: Topic cache port and adapter with TTL
steps.description: Driven port for topic data caching. Adapter persists enriched topics to .sbir/dsip_topics.json with TTL-based freshness check and atomic writes.
criteria: Cache persists enriched topic data with scrape_date and source metadata
Freshness check returns stale when cache exceeds configurable TTL hours
Cache write uses atomic temp-backup-rename pattern
Missing or corrupt cache file handled gracefully (returns None)
Cache schema includes scrape_date, source, ttl_hours, total_topics, enrichment_completeness, topics array

steps.name: FinderService enrichment orchestration
steps.description: Extend FinderService with search_and_enrich() that orchestrates cache check, fetch, pre-filter, enrichment, cache write, and returns enriched candidates for scoring.
criteria: Fresh cache returns cached topics without re-fetching
Stale or missing cache triggers fetch + pre-filter + enrichment pipeline
Pre-filtered candidates enriched before return
Enriched results persisted to cache after enrichment
Partial enrichment failures produce usable results with completeness report in messages
Existing search() and search_and_filter() remain backward-compatible

steps.name: Structural change detection and diagnostics
steps.description: Detect DSIP API response schema changes in enrichment adapter. Save diagnostic data. Produce what/why/do error messages.
criteria: Missing expected keys in enrichment response detected and reported
Raw response saved to .sbir/dsip_debug_response.json on structural change
Error messages follow what/why/do pattern with --file fallback suggestion
Retry with exponential backoff on transient failures
Timeout configurable per request

steps.name: Topic scout agent workflow and DSIP enrichment skill
steps.description: Update topic scout agent to include cache check and enrichment in Phase 1 (INGEST). New DSIP enrichment skill with topic detail structure knowledge. Enriched descriptions used in semantic scoring.
criteria: Agent checks cache freshness before fetching
Agent reports enrichment completeness after enrichment phase
Enriched descriptions available for LLM semantic scoring
DSIP enrichment skill loadable by topic scout agent
